commit.subject: LU-15626 tests: Fix "error" reported by shellcheck for test-framework
commit.message:
LU-15626 tests: Fix "error" reported by shellcheck for test-framework

This patch fixes "error" issues reported by shellcheck
for file lustre/tests/test-framework.sh. This patch also
moves spaces to tabs.

Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I86a18a8d516bc245ba8c28ccc5309ce96e9a6f69
